from fastapi import FastAPI, Request, Depends

app = FastAPI()

class FileStorage:
    def __init__(self, base_path: str = "/data/uploads"):
        self.base_path = base_path

    def read(self, filename: str) -> bytes:
        path = os.path.join(self.base_path, filename)
        with open(path, "rb") as f:
            return f.read()

    def exists(self, filename: str) -> bool:
        return os.path.exists(os.path.join(self.base_path, filename))

    def write(self, filename: str, content: str):
        path = os.path.join(self.base_path, filename)
        os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(path), exist_ok=True)
        with open(path, "w") as f:
            f.write(content)

file_storage = FileStorage()

@app.get("/api/files/{filename}")
async def get_file(filename: str):
    if not file_storage.exists(filename):
        return {"error": "not found"}
    content = file_storage.read(filename)
    return {"filename": filename, "size": len(content)}

@app.post("/api/export")
async def export_data(request: Request):
    body = await request.json()
    csv_content = "\n".join(",".join(str(v) for v in row) for row in body["data"])
    file_storage.write(f"{body['name']}.csv", csv_content)
    return {"status": "exported"}
